commit.message:
Fix SWDA ATH: use 1yr daily closes with sanity filter

meta.fiftyTwoWeekHigh for SWDA.L returns ~12,838 from Yahoo Finance,
which is an adjusted/total-return figure, not the actual market price
(~9,995 GBp). Same issue affected 5yr monthly closes.

Switch to range=1y&interval=1d (raw daily closes) and filter out any
close > 2× current price to guard against future data anomalies.
This produces the correct ~9,995 GBp ATH matching broker data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: fix release workflow — build artifacts then create release

Electron-builder's --publish always creates draft releases which
conflicts with manually created releases. New approach: build with
--publish never, upload artifacts, then create published release
in a separate job.

commit.message:
Switch external input to dynamic foreground tracking via QTimer

Instead of statically capturing the target window at recording start,
ExternalInput now continuously polls GetForegroundWindow() every 200ms
and remembers the last non-Whisper window. This allows the user to
click on any text field in any external app on the fly and have
transcribed speech pasted there.

Key changes:
- ExternalInput: QTimer-based dynamic tracking with HWND exclusion set
- MainWindow: registers own HWND in exclusions, starts tracking on
  external mode switch (not just recording start), keeps tracking
  active between stop/start cycles
- Tracking persists as long as mode is external, stops only on mode
  switch to internal or app quit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: brief polling detects regeneration via updated_at instead of id

ON CONFLICT upsert keeps same row ID, so comparing IDs never detected
a regenerated brief. Now compares updated_at timestamp (which is
explicitly set to now() on upsert) so the scan completes correctly.

* feat(falco): add falcosidekick-ui with Traefik ingress and Cloudflare DNS

Enable the falcosidekick web UI for browsing Falco runtime security
events. Add ExternalName service and IngressRoute to expose it at
falco.lab.kazie.co.uk via Traefik with security headers and TLS.

Add Jenkins CI tools to dev-tools MCP (v0.5.0)

Ported from ~/.jenkins-cli.sh — 4 new MCP tools:

- jenkins_list_targets: show 8 build targets with defaults

feat: add optional comment support in frontmatter for CRU actions (#18)

* feat: add optional comment support in frontmatter for CRU actions

- Add `extract_frontmatter_comment()` to parse YAML comment lines from
  the top of a frontmatter block
- Add `comment: Option<&str>` parameter to `generate_frontmatter` and
  `generate_frontmatter_raw` so comments are written before YAML fields
- Add `comment: Option<String>` to `Item`, `CreateOptions`, and
  `UpdateOptions`; read returns the comment, create writes it, update
  preserves or replaces it
- Propagate comment through soft_delete, restore, duplicate, and
  move_item so it is never silently dropped

fix: complete migration of remaining slash commands to pa: prefix

Updated all remaining files that still had old /command format to use
the new pa:command prefix for AI platform compatibility:

- WORKFLOW.md: runtime override commands
- metrics/: all /metrics commands
- ide-integration/: all IDE config files (Cursor, Copilot, Cline, etc.)
- prompts/: command references and examples
- getting-started/: tutorial commands
- workflow-modes/: mode switching commands
- runbooks/: incident response commands
- collaboration/: session commands
- learning/: report commands
- ui-integration/: design commands
- git/: branch strategy commands
- adr/: architecture decision commands
- contract-testing/: schema validation commands
- existing-projects/: adoption commands
- and many more...

This ensures consistent pa: prefix across all documentation to avoid
conflicts with other AI platforms' slash command systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tva): corriger le calcul TVA codé en dur à 18% ignorant le réglage magasin

Deux bugs causaient l'affichage de TVA incorrecte dans le rapport journalier
alors que le taux était réglé à 0% dans les paramètres du magasin :

1. api/sales.js : taxRate était hardcodé à 0.18 (18%) au lieu de lire
   le champ taxRate du magasin en base. Désormais on fait un findUnique
   sur le magasin pour récupérer son taux réel.
   Si taxRate = 0 → subtotal = total, tax = 0.

2. api/reports/daily.js :
   - store.taxRate || 18 → store.taxRate ?? 0
     (0 || 18 = 18 en JS — traitait 0% comme "non défini")
   - salesSubtotal/salesTax : recalculés à partir du taux actuel du magasin
     (les anciennes ventes DB avaient été stockées avec 18% à cause du bug 1)

commit.message:
Fix WeakMap JS crash causing empty swiper sections

Removed jQuery, Bootstrap, and Swiper from Vite bundle — they were
already loaded via CDN script tags and their CommonJS/UMD format
crashed Vite's ESM build (WeakMap undefined error). This prevented
Swiper initialization, leaving empty space below sections.

Added Bootstrap JS via CDN since it was only in the broken bundle.
Bundle size: 370KB → 51KB.

comparison.
